title: VIIRS NDVI 8-day composite NDVI 0.21 (Sparse / stressed grass cover)
explanation: NDVI 0.21 is well below the 5-year October mean of 0.36 for this section. North pasture imagery shows a fading green band along the playa lake edge but the rest of the section reads brown to amber. South pasture is the worst on the place.
